description: A media planner needs to forecast the potential reach of a Facebook campaign with a given budget and target audience.

nodes.task_description: Define the target audience and budget in Facebook's planning tool.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent inputs the correct targeting and budget parameters.

nodes.task_description: Use the tool to generate an estimated daily reach and impression forecast.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the reach and impression estimates provided by the platform.

nodes.task_description: Incorporate this forecast into the overall media plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent adds the reach forecast to the media planning document.
